---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.
Example: "I find it difficult to share my result because..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why you believe the proposed solution is better.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
